This model considers enemy non-Scheme, non-Strategy markers to be friendly and not enemy. Remove this upgrade after this model suffers more than 2 damage from a single attack.

granted_actions.name: Compose the Scene
granted_actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Then, this model may make a Scheme marker within 1".
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation.

granted_abilities.name: Sealed in Stone
granted_abilities.text: This model receives +2 to its Df and may not be moved by friendly effects.

granted_actions.name: Sentinel's Embrace
granted_actions.effects: Place the target within 1" of this model.
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only.

granted_actions.name: Memories of Granite
granted_actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Df duel or gain a Slow token.

triggers.name: Striking Stone
triggers.text: Enemy models that failed to resist this action are dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Aura of Strength
triggers.text: Friendly models within range heal 1.

granted_actions.name: Tenacity
granted_actions.effects: This model heals 2.
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Discard a card.

granted_abilities.name: Flight
granted_abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

granted_actions.name: Lightning Strike
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action ignores LoS. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Models on terrain Ht 2 or higher suffer a (-) to resist this action.

triggers.name: Knock Aside
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3".

granted_abilities.name: Ashen Ovation
granted_abilities.text: For each raise this model's attack actions receive, an enemy model within 3" of this model gains an Entranced token.

granted_actions.name: Painted Fury
granted_actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Then, this model may declare a (melee) action.
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation.

name: Wandering River Style
description: This model gains the following actions:

granted_actions.name: Four Winds Punch
granted_actions.effects: If a Chi token was used during this action, it has a raise value of 3. Move the target up to 4", +4" for each raise (maximum 12"). If this model is not a master and this action did not receive a raise, discard this upgrade after resolving this action.
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.

triggers.name: Collision
triggers.text: The target and enemy models within (X)1" of it are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Self-Reflection
triggers.text: This model gains a Chi token.

granted_actions.name: Enlightened Leap
granted_actions.effects: If a Chi token was used during this action, it has a raise value of 3. Place this model anywhere within range. If this model is not a master and this action did not receive a raise, discard this upgrade after resolving this action.
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation.
